title: Smart Manikin Figure 1 — equipment placement diagram / standard equipment placement reference
description: Standard Smart Manikin table/station placement: iPad, manikins, AED Training Pads, consumables, Pocket Mask, and BVM. Metadata is source-reviewed from AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701; no image analysis was performed.
what_it_shows: Standard Smart Manikin table/station placement: iPad, manikins, AED Training Pads, consumables, Pocket Mask, and BVM.
when_to_show: Table / station pre-check, equipment placement, supplies check, and desk/table layout questions.
caution: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.

title: Smart Manikin Figure 2 — Example floor setup
description: Example floor setup with manikin, BVM, pocket mask, AED pads, and tablet stand. Metadata is source-reviewed from AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701; no image analysis was performed.
what_it_shows: Example floor setup with manikin, BVM, pocket mask, AED pads, and tablet stand.
when_to_show: Station layout, equipment placement, and rescue-breathing item questions.
caution: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.

title: Smart Manikin Figure 3 — Tablet home screen with two training apps
description: Tablet home screen with Adult and Pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED and BLS Healthcare Provider training apps. Metadata is source-reviewed from AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701; no image analysis was performed.
what_it_shows: Tablet home screen with Adult and Pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED and BLS Healthcare Provider training apps.
when_to_show: Student quick readiness and app launch questions.
caution: Use only to identify the expected app screen; do not change device settings.

title: Smart Manikin Figure 4 — Normal Login / Continue screen
description: Normal login / Continue screen expected when the app loads correctly. Metadata is source-reviewed from AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701; no image analysis was performed.
what_it_shows: Normal login / Continue screen expected when the app loads correctly.
when_to_show: Black tab, app not loading, or login/continue screen questions.
caution: Reference only; if a black tab remains after one reload, document and escalate.

title: Smart Manikin Figure 5 — Example session screen with Bluetooth / Submit / Pass
description: Example session screen with Bluetooth, Call Support, Exit, Submit, and Adult / Infant Pass controls. Metadata is source-reviewed from AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701; no image analysis was performed.
what_it_shows: Example session screen with Bluetooth, Call Support, Exit, Submit, and Adult / Infant Pass controls.
when_to_show: Bluetooth, session, Submit, Pass, and completion evidence questions.
caution: Reference only; do not infer certificate eligibility or repair steps from the image.
